mechanism_narrative: A lower federal funds rate trend reduces equity discount rates and supports leverage-sensitive risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when FEDFUNDS is near the zero lower bound.
failure_condition: Reject if lower 3-month changes in FEDFUNDS do not produce higher 20-day S&P 500 returns than higher changes in at least 60% of walk-forward test windows.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment-rate crossing above 7.0% signals persistent labor-market slack and weaker household income growth, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations with UNRATE above 7.0% have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of walk-forward cases.

mechanism_narrative: Joint expansion in retail sales and housing starts signals broadening private demand, raising expected revenues and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS 3-month growth crosses above 0 and HOUST 3-month growth crosses above 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive-growth trigger does not outperform cases where only one series is positive by at least 25 basis points over 60 trading days.

mechanism_narrative: A negative break in industrial production growth signals weakening output and operating leverage, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO downside-crossing events are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI while FEDFUNDS remains pinned near zero raises the risk of future policy tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 3.0% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if the CPI acceleration and low-FEDFUNDS interaction has nonnegative average 20-day returns or a negative-hit rate below 55% in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive real GDP growth reflects expanding aggregate demand and corporate cash-flow capacity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher year-over-year GDPC1 growth fails to rank ahead of lower growth for 60-day S&P 500 returns in at least half of rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll acceleration combined with a falling unemployment rate signals improving labor income without rising joblessness, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change crosses above 150 thousand and UNRATE 3-month change is below 0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-acceleration and unemployment-decline trigger does not generate positive 5-day returns in at least 55% of walk-forward observations.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts below 1000 thousand units signal weak residential investment and subdued durable-goods demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST below 1000 is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or has no negative return differential versus non-triggered periods.
